DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Read code text from standard input.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Previous code block id for ordered code in the same section.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Read example section text from standard input.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Previous section id for ordered sections in the same example.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Read the first example section text from standard input.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Previous example id for ordered examples on the same subject.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Stable id for the first example section.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Narrative body format. Defaults to Markdown.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Navigation label for the page. Defaults to the page title when first authored.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional authored documentation source display name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Documentation subject type. Defaults to Guide.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Page title and subject display name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Set this page as the default documentation view root.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to browse. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional documentation view id, name, or title.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to list. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional parent subject id for the imported CLI application.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaCli workspace to refresh reference documentation from.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional parent subject id for the imported model subject.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source Meta workspace to refresh model reference documentation from.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace entity name to include.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Property name to import as a generated fact.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Suite workspace to rebuild. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to render. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Filter results by documentation subject type.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to search. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Read authored description body from standard input.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Description slot to add or update. Default: Summary.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional description title. Defaults to the slot.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDocs workspace to validate. Defaults to the current directory.
